details: The agent executed appropriate commands (gh pr view, gh pr checks, gh api for comments and reviews), correctly identified the PR title, author (joshavant/Josh Avant), summarized the body accurately, reported CI results (4 failed, 21 passed, 6 skipped) with the correct failed checks, and accurately summarized the single Greptile bot comment with its 5/5 confidence score. All data matches the command outputs shown in the trajectory.
